creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
edwin       2007-09-06 03:12:23 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    .                    MOVED 
    comms                Makefile 
  Removed files:
    comms/tilp           Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    comms/tilp/files     patch-Makefile.in patch-src-tilp_plugin.c 
                         patch-src-tilp_printl.c 
  Log:
  [delete] comms/tilp
  
          comms/tilp has been superseded by comms/tilp2
  
          It was kept arround until the latter matured, which can now
          be considered the case. The original version is no longer
          supported by the authors and both ports conflict now. I'm
          not sure what exactly should happen, but for me the port
          can be removed and maybe added to MOVED.
  
  PR:             ports/115979
  Submitted by:   Tijl Coosemans <tijl@ulyssis.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1469    +2 -1      ports/MOVED
  1.175     +0 -1      ports/comms/Makefile
  1.19      +0 -39     ports/comms/tilp/Makefile (dead)
  1.5       +0 -3      ports/comms/tilp/distinfo (dead)
  1.3       +0 -17     ports/comms/tilp/files/patch-Makefile.in (dead)
  1.3       +0 -18     ports/comms/tilp/files/patch-src-tilp_plugin.c (dead)
  1.2       +0 -18     ports/comms/tilp/files/patch-src-tilp_printl.c (dead)
  1.2       +0 -8      ports/comms/tilp/pkg-descr (dead)
  1.4       +0 -146    ports/comms/tilp/pkg-plist (dead)
